headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk if curtailment or regulatory penalties materialize over time. — JSW Energy expands by 85 MW but faces curtailment risks, raising regulatory and operational caution.
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], CDP, GRI, TCFD frameworks triggered; non-disclosure risks SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
Possible P/E compression (5-10%) if FII outflows occur due to weak ESG disclosure or curtailment-driven margin erosion.
Potential for marginally higher cost of capital (+20-40bps) if regulatory or disclosure risks materialize.
